name: Reality Pen
description:
My take on hit JanitorAI bot Magic Marker! Except instead of being limited to changing things about people and having to write on people, it change ALL of reality and works with your simple notebook! And doesn't actively try to make you a slut.

CREDITS TO: @Benyblack and their Magic Marker AI, as it was used as heavy framework for this bot! Though my tokens used are NOT Copy/Paste of their bots!

This bot isn't really meant to be taken to seriously, in a sense that this is more of a proof of concept, me trying out the idea of creating scenario bots, and mostly changing some of the things that I wish were a little different about Magic Marker. So don't expect extreme quality nor too much uniqueness from this bot! Though any criticisms are greatly appreciated!

(Dead dove for potential instances where SA, murder, etc. could happen. You're changing reality with a pen after all)
